name: Verify Internal Transfer Form Load
expected: Transfer form loads with from/to dropdowns
steps: Assert From Account and To Account dropdowns are present

name: Verify Same Account Validation
expected: Error shows if From and To accounts are the same
steps: Select same account for From and To
Assert error 'From and To accounts must be different' is displayed

name: Verify Insufficient Funds Validation
expected: Error shows when transfer amount exceeds available balance
steps: Select valid From and To accounts
Enter amount greater than From account balance

name: Verify Successful Internal Transfer
expected: Transfer succeeds and shows confirmation page
steps: Select valid From and To accounts
Click Confirm Transfer in the dialog

name: Verify Scheduled Transfer Flow
expected: Scheduled transfers require a future date
steps: Assert error 'Transfer date cannot be in the past' is displayed

name: Verify Transfer Balances Update
expected: Account balances update immediately after successful transfer
steps: Record starting balances of From and To accounts
Assert From account balance decreased by $10
Assert To account balance increased by $10
